allow: Bash(wsl bash -c "ps aux | grep python | grep -v grep | grep -v unattended")
Bash(wsl bash -c "source ~/colbert-env/bin/activate && python -c ''import faiss; print\(""GPU count:"", faiss.get_num_gpus\(\)\)'' 2>&1")
Bash(wsl bash -c "kill 697 665 688 689 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; ps aux | grep run_overnight | grep -v grep")
Bash(wsl bash -c "source ~/colbert-env/bin/activate && pip install faiss-gpu 2>&1 | tail -20")
Bash(wsl bash -c "source ~/colbert-env/bin/activate && python --version && pip install faiss-gpu-cu12 2>&1 | tail -10")
Bash(wsl bash -c "source ~/colbert-env/bin/activate && python -c ''import faiss; print\(""GPU count:"", faiss.get_num_gpus\(\)\)''")
Bash(wsl bash -c "source ~/colbert-env/bin/activate && pip list | grep faiss")
